entries.evidence_summary: The ad-hoc runner now requires and validates a prior compliance-map.json before a follow-up review round starts, so compliance evidence is mandatory in the external review loop too.
pathExists and buildAuditEnvelope are now single-sourced in audit-utils.ts and imported by both board.ts and index.ts instead of being duplicated.
The board now reconciles canonical unresolved evidence after effective-verdict overrides and persists that reconciled state instead of reusing the raw leader payload.
Shared governed workflow helpers now run through the shared review engine and the shared audit utility module instead of maintaining diverging local copies.
Leader outputs now fail closed unless arbitration invariants are satisfied, and frozen_with_conditions only survives when only deferred minor or suggestion work remains.
Reviewer and leader parsing now requires the loaded governed review config, validates required fields and vocabularies from that contract, and rejects malformed payloads before runtime branching.
executeBoard now catches BoardBlockedError at the board boundary, returns the typed blocked result, and allows result/postmortem artifact generation to continue.
